text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I head to training, I spot Matikanefukukitaru
standing very still, a horrified look on her face.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: The whole area is awash in a carpet of yellow-green! Oh, what do I do, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can run today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I calm her down so she can explain what she's so
flustered about.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: My unlucky color today is yellow-green, you see...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Which means that all the turf around us is going
to bring me bad luck!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'll end up cursing myself for life if I run on the
track right now! Gah! I don't even wanna think
about that! Running is just not an option today!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry, but I'm taking the day off!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to invalidate her beliefs, but it seems
excessive to let her skip a whole day of training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I ask her if there's anything we can do to let her
train without worrying about her unlucky color.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Interesting question. Taking matters into
our own hands is certainly a novel approach...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Still, it's not like we can dye the turf another
color...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Unless...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I've got it! Wait here, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a moment, she comes rushing back... with a
pair of sunglasses.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I found a solution! If I put these on, the dreaded
yellow-green hues around us will look like a
harmless dull brown!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I'll try it out right away!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! My guess was right! Everything's brown now!
Hooray!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
In fact, the training grounds feel even more
mystical bathed in sepia tones! Oh, how
wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I guess it's worth thinking outside the box
sometimes!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now I won't have to worry about running into
anything yellow-green! Ah, what a blessed day!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to her sunglasses, Matikanefukukitaru is
full of energy for the entire training session.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her bright enthusiasm puts the others in a good
mood too, and they have a good time at training.
